signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair to Replace Powell in May; Wholesale Inflation Accelerates Amid Tariff Impa
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair to Replace Powell in May; Wholesale Inflation Accelerates Amid Tariff Impacts | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Fed kept federal funds rate unchanged on Wednesday after three prior cuts, with PCE inflation at 3% annual pace in December (up from 2.8% in November), driven by services prices and Trump tariff effects on goods [1]. Powell expects tariff price

signals.headline: Ethereum Price Hits $2,370 on April 14, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Hits $2,370 on April 14, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum reached $2,370.04 at 8:30 a.m. ET on April 14, up $174 from the prior day, confirming resolution of Robinhood prediction markets for ETH at or above $2,370 (previously at 29¢) and $2,350 (at 94¢)[1][5].  
Bitcoin traded at $74,314.61 alongside this ETH rise, up from $71,188.84 on April 13[1][4].
